runs.stdout: {"keywords": ["mcp server filesystem", "mcp server database", "model context protocol server list"], "sources": [{"url": "https://glama.ai/mcp/servers", "ok": false, "error": "HTTP Error 103: Early Hints"}, {"url": "https://github.com/modelcontextprotocol", "status_code": 200, "ok": true}], "notes": ["建议优先选官方 MCP 或 star/维护活跃度高的仓库。"]}

runs.stdout: {"queries": ["SKILL.md agent workflow examples", "anthropic agent skills", "cursor skill template"], "selection_rules": ["优先官方文档或高质量仓库", "必须含触发条件、工作流、约束与示例", "优先可执行 scripts/ 资源"]}

selection_rules: 优先官方文档或高质量仓库

runs.stdout: {"targets": [{"url": "https://lov.linkeddata.es/dataset/lov/", "ok": true, "status_code": 200}, {"url": "https://schema.org/docs/schemas.html", "ok": true, "status_code": 200}], "recommendation": ["优先导入与当前 domain 直接相关的 ontology，避免过宽泛本体污染。"]}
